summary: Iteration 17 frontend-only verification of (1) AdminTabsBar refactor with primary tabs inline + 'More' dropdown, (2) Master Query AI panel, (3) Blog Admin panel CRUD, (4) IntakeForm mobile smooth scroll. All 4 in-progress items pass end-to-end against https://match-engine-test-1.preview.emergentagent.com.
critical_code_review_comments: AdminDashboard.jsx is now 5555 lines — MasterQueryPanel (~5041) and BlogAdminPanel (~5241) are appended at the end. Strong recommendation (carrying over from iteration 15/16) to extract these and ProfileCompletionPanel to their own files under src/pages/admin/panels/ for maintainability.

BlogAdminPanel.startEdit sets `editing = post object` and uses `editing.id` in the PUT URL (line 5310). If the admin clicks Edit then immediately changes another post's data, this works correctly because each Edit click resets state — no concern, just noting the implicit dependency.
BlogAdminPanel uses native window.confirm() for delete (line 5335). Functional but inconsistent with the rest of the app's shadcn dialog pattern. Low priority polish.

MasterQueryPanel does not surface the snapshot-fetch network error in any user-actionable way beyond the inline pill — if the snapshot endpoint is slow on first paint (>2s) the panel still allows asking questions which is correct behavior; just noting the UX choice is intentional.

IntakeForm smooth-scroll uses `isFirstRender` ref to skip initial mount (line 132-137) — verified working: scrollY samples [4007, 3982, 3981...] show 3 distinct intermediate positions during step transition, confirming the `behavior: 'smooth'` animation is taking effect rather than an instant jump. Card top settles at 79.9px from viewport top (target ~80px header offset). Excellent.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on validated paths (admin tabs refactor + Master Query Q&A + Blog CRUD + intake mobile smooth scroll + public blog endpoint)

test_credentials: Admin master password: admin123! (login at /admin → 'Master password' tab → admin-login-btn).
seed_data_creation: Created + then immediately deleted one TEST_Blog_Post_E2E post via the admin UI (slug test-blog-e2e-<ts>). DB clean after run. Pre-existing 'welcome-to-theravoca' published post was left untouched.
context_for_next_testing_agent: AdminTabsBar PRIMARY = [requests, therapists, all_therapists, patients, completion, master_query]; SECONDARY (under tab-more-btn → tab-more-menu) = [invited_therapists, coverage_gap, opt_outs, feedback, referrals, referral_sources, team, blog, email_templates]. Secondary items use testid `more-tab-{id}` while the inline pinned active secondary uses plain `tab-{id}`. Master Query testids: master-query-panel / master-query-input / master-query-ask-btn / master-query-history / master-query-entry-{i} / master-query-toggle-snapshot / master-query-snapshot-json / master-query-snapshot-error. Blog testids: blog-admin-panel / blog-new-btn / blog-editor / blog-title-input / blog-slug-input / blog-summary-input / blog-body-input / blog-hero-input / blog-publish-checkbox / blog-save-btn / blog-cancel-btn / blog-row-{slug} / blog-edit-{slug} / blog-toggle-{slug} / blog-delete-{slug}. Delete uses native window.confirm — Playwright must register a dialog handler. Public endpoints verified: GET /api/blog returned 1 post (welcome-to-theravoca) all published; GET /api/blog/welcome-to-theravoca returned body_markdown.
rca of the issue: N/A — all four in-progress items verified working. Detailed evidence: (a) AdminTabsBar — all 6 primary + 9 secondary testids present, tab-more-menu opens on tab-more-btn click, clicking more-tab-blog activates blog panel and pins tab-blog inline. (b) Master Query — snapshot loaded, toggle reveals JSON, asking 'How many requests came in this week?' returned an LLM answer in master-query-entry-0 within 30s. (c) Blog CRUD — create, toggle-publish, edit-populate, delete-after-confirm all worked; save button correctly disabled when title empty. (d) Intake mobile smooth scroll — at 390x844 viewport, click of next-btn animated scrollY from 4113 → 4007 → 3982 → 3981 (3 distinct intermediate samples, confirming behavior:'smooth' is firing); final card top is 79.9px below viewport top, matching the intended 80px header offset; step-label updated to 'Step 2 of 7' and remained visible. Initial mount did not auto-scroll (isFirstRender guard works). Public /api/blog returns only published posts as expected.
